_meta.description: lesson_01 の語彙カード画像生成プロンプト（S列投入用）。master_prompt_design_guide_v2_7.py 準拠。A1: 肌色フレーズなし（diverse_unspecified）。A3: アスペクト比プレフィックスなし（GAS経由=ASPECT_RATIO:1:1 付与）。VISUAL_CANON_RULE適用済み（医者=聴診器のみ/先生=マーカーor教科書）。

notes.skin_policy: diverse_unspecified: 肌色フレーズを追記しない（handoff §4.4/§10 確定方針）
notes.aspect_ratio: GAS経由生成のため本文にアスペクト比指定なし（generateImages.gs が ASPECT_RATIO:1:1 を自動付与）
notes.gas_pending: GAS PERSON_PROFILES['医者'] に holding a clipboard が残存。v2.7 プロンプトが S列に投入されればその記述は無効化される

vocabulary.prompt:
[PURPOSE]
Create a vocabulary card illustration for Japanese language learning materials.
The image must instantly communicate the meaning of "医者" (doctor) at a glance.

[SUBJECT]
A doctor wearing a white coat (open at the front) over a simple shirt. A stethoscope hangs around the neck — THIS IS THE ONLY REQUIRED PROP. DO NOT add a clipboard, otoscope, pen, or any other medical tools. Professional and calm posture, slight forward lean of engaged readiness.
The character's role must be immediately obvious from clothing, posture, and props alone.

[SCENE & ACTION]
Full-body shot. The character is centered and fills 70-80% of the image area.
Camera angle: HORIZONTAL 3/4 view at EYE LEVEL — camera positioned at the subject's
eye height, rotated approximately 30-45 degrees to one side.
Solid white background. No other characters or objects in the frame.
85mm portrait lens equivalent.

[STYLE RECIPE — DO NOT CHANGE]
Minimalist flat vector illustration. Clean continuous black outlines with consistent line weight.
Completely flat solid color fills only. Color palette: soft cream white background,
deep slate navy outlines, muted warm blue and warm amber gold as accents.
This should look like it belongs in a brand style guide, not like AI art. Keep line weights consistent.
No gradients, no shadows, no 3D effects, no photoreal textures.
Apply zero ambient lighting, zero drop shadows, zero global illumination.

[CONSTRAINTS]
No text, no letters, no numbers, no symbols inside the image.
Generate as if this is part of a unified educational brand style guide.

[PURPOSE]
Create a vocabulary card illustration for Japanese language learning materials.
The image must instantly communicate the meaning of "日本人" (Japanese person) at a glance.

[SUBJECT]
A generic adult person in plain casual clothes.
A prominent national flag badge — white background with a solid red circle (hinomaru) centered on it — is pinned clearly on the chest or lapel.
The flag badge fills approximately 10-12% of the image frame and is the PRIMARY visual identifier.
The person's expression is neutral and welcoming. No role-specific props or costumes.

[SCENE & ACTION]
Full-body shot. The character is centered and fills 70-80% of the image area.
Camera angle: HORIZONTAL 3/4 view at EYE LEVEL.
The flag badge faces forward and is clearly visible to the viewer.
Solid white background. No other objects or background elements.
85mm portrait lens equivalent.

[STYLE RECIPE — DO NOT CHANGE]
Minimalist flat vector illustration. Clean continuous black outlines with consistent line weight.
Completely flat solid color fills only. Color palette: soft cream white background,
deep slate navy outlines, muted warm blue and warm amber gold as accents.
This should look like it belongs in a brand style guide, not like AI art. Keep line weights consistent.
No gradients, no shadows, no 3D effects, no photoreal textures.
Apply zero ambient lighting, zero drop shadows, zero global illumination.

[CONSTRAINTS]
No text, no letters, no numbers anywhere in the image.
EXCEPTION: The flag badge design (shapes, colors, geometric patterns) IS permitted
— it is the sole national identifier and must be rendered with accurate colors and shapes.
Do NOT render any written text even on the flag.
Generate as if this is part of a unified educational brand style guide.

[PURPOSE]
Create a vocabulary card illustration for Japanese language learning materials.
The building must be IMMEDIATELY and UNAMBIGUOUSLY recognizable as a 病院 (hospital) at a glance.

[SUBJECT]
The main subject is a hospital building.
A single Japanese signage word "病院" is mounted clearly near the entrance.

[SCENE & ACTION]
Viewed from a slight three-quarter front angle at eye level, 35mm wide-angle lens equivalent.
Straight vertical lines, natural perspective with no fisheye distortion.
Pale blue or soft cream sky background.
Functional cues:
- Entrance cue: automatic sliding glass doors with a large red cross symbol mounted prominently above the entrance
- User action cue: a patient figure approaching the entrance from the side
- Surrounding anchor: a red cross or caduceus symbol on the building wall; clean clinical exterior
The building fills 70% of the frame. Negative space in the top third.

[STYLE RECIPE — DO NOT CHANGE]
Minimalist flat vector illustration. Clean continuous black outlines with consistent line weight.
Completely flat solid color fills only. Color palette: soft cream white background,
deep slate navy outlines, muted warm blue and warm amber gold as accents.
This should look like it belongs in a brand style guide, not like AI art. Keep line weights consistent.
No gradients, no shadows, no 3D effects, no photoreal textures.
Apply zero ambient lighting, zero drop shadows, zero global illumination.

[CONSTRAINTS]
EXCEPTION: The single Japanese building signage word "病院" is permitted on the building.
No other text, letters, numbers anywhere in the image.
No gradients, no shadows, no 3D effects.
Generate as if this is part of a unified educational brand style guide.
